summary: Base W10 (~18 mpw, §4.C) — second post-deload step-up under the permanent Tue-lift / Wed-T / Thu-off template (Adj #92). Tue Hyp A logged: incline holds 145 (top of LP, +5→150 only on a cleaner set-3, Adj #107), rear-delt 130 bump landed (set 1 RIR 3 = prescribed, Adj #112), and both arm resets validated — preacher 60 ran clean (bump-eligible 65, Adj #109) and pushdown 20 cleared its hold (22.5 re-attempt eligible, pain-gated — elbow mild ≤4/10, §10.A clock stays reset, Adj #110). Wed threshold 2×15 @ T logged: work reps 7:49/7:38/mi at RPE 7/RIR 2-3, Zoom Fly 6/road, with mild post-run L Achilles soreness (Adj #113). Fri: the AM-gate passed (clean Achilles) and the long-owed standalone fresh-day run-MHR max test ran — peak 191 ties but doesn't exceed the rower lock, zones unchanged, closes the long-open retest (Adj #9/#45/#53/#93/#96/#106/#114). Sat Hyp B logged, long run PUNTED to Sun: the roughest session of the cycle — lat pulldown 160 bump only partial-landed (sets 3-4 fell to 6, Adj #115), preacher collapsed even on the proven-clean 60 after a 65×12/6 attempt (Tue 4×10 vs Sat 4×12 rep-target mismatch, Adj #118), and the proven-clean seated calf 335 also failed its backoff sets after a clean 345 opener (Adj #120). Wins: chest-supp row set 1 RIR 2 = first headroom since the reset (Adj #116), DB lateral best within-band spread yet (Adj #117). Fed/fasted status and today's AM Achilles read were not reported — flag for next log. Remaining: Sun = the punted long run.

days.note: Logged — easy 40 min @ 10:43 honest-Z1 + hill strides 7 × @ 4.5% grade (step up from 6@4%), cadence 183 held at 6:00/mi (no sprint overshoot); HR 166/168 tight & cool; no pain anywhere AM/during/post — Achilles + knees clean on the 2nd hill dose (Adj #106)

Logged — incline 145 hold (5/5/5 RIR 1/1/0, top of LP, Adj #107); rear-delt 125→130 bump landed (set 1 RIR 3 = prescribed, Adj #112); preacher reset 60 ran clean → bump-eligible 65 (Adj #109); pushdown 20 hold cleared (set 3 RIR 2) → 22.5 re-attempt eligible, pain-gated — elbow mild ≤4/10, §10.A clock stays reset (Adj #110); DB lat 30 hold (Adj #108), decline crunch BW hold (Adj #111)

Logged — work reps 7:49/7:38/mi, HR avg 179/177, power 256/263W, cadence 171/176, RPE 7/RIR 2-3; road, Zoom Fly 6. 4th straight T quick of the 7:50–7:55 nudge (Adj #77/#93), recalibration still deferred to W12 5K-TT. L Achilles mild dull soreness AFTER, below Adj #34 trigger — recheck AM (Adj #113)
Off (permanent, Adj #92) — rest day, no session logged.

Logged — AM-gate passed (clean Achilles); 8-min build @ 8:00/mi + 1-mi all-out ~7:00/mi RPE 10, HR climb 184→peak 191. Peak ties but doesn't exceed the rower lock → 191 + zones stand unchanged (Adj #53 protocol); closes the long-owed retest (Adj #9/#45/#53/#93/#96/#106). CD ~10 min, pace not clearly recorded. No pain anywhere AM/during/post (Adj #114).

days.session: Hyp B (logged) — long run PUNTED to Sun
days.note: Logged — roughest Hyp B of the cycle. Lat pulldown 160 bump partial (sets 1-2 held 8, sets 3-4 fell to 6, Adj #115); chest-supp row 75 set 1 RIR 2 = first headroom since the reset (Adj #116); DB lateral best within-band spread yet 12/15/12/13 (Adj #117); preacher 65×12/6 then even the clean 60 only gave 6/6 — Tue 4×10 vs Sat 4×12 mismatch (Adj #118); pushdown sets 1-3 held floor, set 4 fell to 6 (Adj #119); seated calf 345 opener clean then collapsed, proven-clean 335 backoff also failed (Adj #120); chest fly both sets RIR 0 = regression (Adj #121); decline crunch openers RIR 2 improved, gate still not met (Adj #122). Fed status + AM Achilles not reported (Adj #123).

days.session: Long Z1 60 min (punted from Sat, Adj #123) + SI prehab
days.note: Punted §4.C W10 long — keep it genuinely easy 9:45–10:45/mi; watch L Achilles AM + during/post given today's seated-calf collapse and unreported AM read. SI prehab: Tyler 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, clamshell/bird-dog/side plank.
